entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00149) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00149 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE PERFORMANCE UNDER CLIN 7009AC "LJS CALIBRATION SESSION."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00150) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00150 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ISSUE A UNILATERAL CHANGES CLAUSE DIRECTION PURSUANT TO TSA AMS CLAUSE 3.10.1-12 "CHANGES FIXED PRICE ALTERNATE I".
THEREFORE, THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED TO AUTHORIZE THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE PERSONAL IDENTIFY VERIFICATION (PIV) SOLUTION AS DIRECTED HEREIN.
THE CONTRACTOR SHALL, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 26, 2015, IMPLEMENT AN APPROVED PERSONAL IDENTIFY VERIFICATION (PIV) SOLUTION FOR ANY SYSTEM PROCESSING OR STORING TSA DATA. THE SOLUTION SHALL BE IMPLEMENTED FOR ALL USER ACCESS AT THE USER AND PRIVILEGED USER LEVELS. APPROVED PIV SOLUTIONS CAN BE FOUND AT HTTP://WWW.IDMANAGEMENT.GOV/APPROVED-PRODUCTS-LIST-APL
FOR PRIVILEGED USERS, THE CONTRACTOR SHALL IMPLEMENT THE XCEEDIUM SOLUTION, WHICH IS BEING PROVIDED AS GFE. THE CONTRACTOR SHOULD EXPECT THE DELIVERY OF THE GFE SOLUTION, XCEEDIUM, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 22, 2015. PRIVILEGED USERS ARE DEFINED BY NIST SPECIAL PUBLICATION 800-53; SUPPLEMENTAL GUIDANCE: PRIVILEGED ROLES ARE ORGANIZATION-DEFINED ROLES ASSIGNED TO INDIVIDUALS THAT ALLOW THOSE INDIVIDUALS TO PERFORM CERTAIN SECURITY-RELEVANT FUNCTIONS THAT ORDINARY USERS ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO PERFORM. THESE PRIVILEGED ROLES INCLUDE, FOR EXAMPLE, KEY MANAGEMENT, ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT, NETWORK AND SYSTEM ADMINISTRATION, DATABASE ADMINISTRATION, AND WEB ADMINISTRATION.
THE CONTRACTOR SHALL ELECTRONICALLY PROVIDE LOGGING INFORMATION NEAR REAL TIME TO THE TSA SOC FOR ALL SYSTEMS AND USERS PROCESSING, STORING, OR ACCESSING TSA DATA. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL RETAIN RECORDS OF THE LOGGING INFORMATION FOR A PERIOD OF SEVEN (7) YEARS AFTER THE EXPIRATION OF ITS CONTRACT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL EFFECT UNTIL OTHERWISE AUTHORIZED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00151) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00151 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE THE UNILATERAL CHANGES CLAUSE DIRECTION ISSUED IN MODIFICATION P00150 PURSUANT TO TSA AMS CLAUSE 3.10.1-12 "CHANGES - FIXED PRICE ALTERNATE I".
THEREFORE, THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED TO AUTHORIZE THE IMPLEMENTATION OF AN APPROVED PERSONAL IDENTIFY VERIFICATION (PIV) SOLUTION AS DIRECTED HEREIN.
THE CONTRACTOR SHALL IMPLEMENT AN APPROVED PERSONAL IDENTIFY VERIFICATION (PIV) SOLUTION FOR ANY SYSTEM PROCESSING OR STORING TSA DATA.
THE CONTRACTOR SHALL, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 26, 2015, IMPLEMENT THE GOVERNMENT FURNISHED EQUIPMENT (GFE) SOLUTION, XCEEDIUM, FOR PRIVILEGED USERS FOR ANY SYSTEM PROCESSING OR STORING TSA DATA. THE CONTRACTOR SHOULD EXPECT THE DELIVERY OF THE GFE SOLUTION, XCEEDIUM. PRIVILEGED USERS ARE DEFINED BY NIST SPECIAL PUBLICATION 800-53; SUPPLEMENTAL GUIDANCE: PRIVILEGED ROLES ARE ORGANIZATION-DEFINED ROLES ASSIGNED TO INDIVIDUALS THAT ALLOW THOSE INDIVIDUALS TO PERFORM CERTAIN SECURITY-RELEVANT FUNCTIONS THAT ORDINARY USERS ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO PERFORM. THESE PRIVILEGED ROLES INCLUDE, FOR EXAMPLE, KEY MANAGEMENT, ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT, NETWORK AND SYSTEM ADMINISTRATION, DATABASE ADMINISTRATION, AND WEB ADMINISTRATION. UNLESS OTHERWISE DIRECTED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER, THE CONTRACTOR SHALL FOR THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT REQUIRE ALL PRIVILEGED USERS TO UTILIZE THE GFE XCEEDIUM SOLUTION WHEN ACCESSING SYSTEMS THAT PROCESS OR STORE TSA DATA.
THE CONTRACTOR SHALL, NOT LATER THAN JULY 31, 2015, IMPLEMENT AN APPROVED PIV SOLUTION FOR ALL NON-PRIVILEGED USERS FOR ANY SYSTEM PROCESSING OR STORING TSA DATA. APPROVED PIV SOLUTIONS CAN BE FOUND AT HTTP://WWW.IDMANAGEMENT.GOV/APPROVED-PRODUCTS-LIST-APL. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL NOTIFY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER IN WRITING OF THE SELECTED PIV SOLUTION CHOSEN TO FULFILL THE REQUIREMENT FOR NON PRIVILEGED USERS. THE CONTRACTING OFFICER SHALL INCLUDE THE NAME OF THE NON PRIVILEGED USER PIV SOLUTION INTO THE CONTRACT. UNLESS OTHERWISE DIRECTED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER, THE CONTRACTOR SHALL FOR THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT REQUIRE ALL NON-PRIVILEGED USERS TO UTILIZE THE SELECTED SOLUTION WHEN ACCESSING SYSTEMS THAT PROCESS OR STORE TSA DATA.
BEGINNING NOT LATER THAN JUNE 27, 2015, FOR PRIVILEGED USERS AND AUGUST 1, 2015 FOR NON PRIVILEGED USERS; THE CONTRACTOR SHALL ELECTRONICALLY PROVIDE LOGGING INFORMATION NEAR REAL TIME TO THE TSA SOC FOR ALL SYSTEMS AND USERS PROCESSING, STORING, OR ACCESSING TSA DATA. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL RETAIN RECORDS OF THE LOGGING INFORMATION FOR A PERIOD OF SEVEN (7) YEARS AFTER THE EXPIRATION OF ITS CONTRACT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL EFFECT UNTIL OTHERWISE AUTHORIZED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00156) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00156 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO: (1.) REIMBURSE LOCKHEED MARTIN (LM) FOR THE ACTUALS ACCRUED FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY OFFICER (TSO) HIRING PROCESS CHANGE AUTOMATED SOLUTION IMPACT ANALYSIS; AS WELL AS (2.) RELEASE THE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY ADMINISTRATION (TSA) FROM ANY ADDITIONAL CLAIMS RESULTING FROM THE DECISION NOT TO AWARD THE TSO HIRING PROCESS CHANGE REQUIREMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00158 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT (HSTS01-08-D-HRM010) IS TO: (1.) EXERCISE CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBER (CLIN) 7003AD "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) - MOBILES;" AS WELL AS (2.) ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 7003AE "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) - MOBILES."
